description:
An aerodynamicist needs to run a component-buildup drag analysis on the NASA eCRM-001 transport configuration. To analyze the aerodynamic interaction between the main wing and the tail, group the components into a "Wing_Body" set and an "Empennage" set. 

Starting with /home/ga/Documents/OpenVSP/eCRM-001_wing_tail.vsp3 loaded in OpenVSP:
1. Open the Set Setup / Set manager in OpenVSP.
2. Create a new custom Set named exactly `Wing_Body`.
3. Add the fuselage and the main wing components to the `Wing_Body` set.
4. Create a second custom Set named exactly `Empennage`.
5. Add the horizontal tail and vertical tail components to the `Empennage` set.
6. Save the modified model to `/home/ga/Documents/OpenVSP/exports/eCRM-001_sets.vsp3`.
